description_long: This is a discarded aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered bottom. The can is predominantly turquoise in color, featuring a large, bold label on one side that reads 'BAJA BLASTED' in red and green stylized text, surrounded by comic-style starburst graphics. A vertical black-and-white barcode is visible on the opposite side of the can, adding to its commercial appearance. The top and bottom of the can are metallic silver, with the top featuring a standard can rim but no visible pull tab. The surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of printed aluminum cans. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can looks clean and intact.
description: A turquoise aluminum beverage can with a bold 'BAJA BLASTED' label, starburst graphics, and a barcode on the back. The can is smooth, glossy, and undamaged.
description_view_0: The can's back is shown, featuring a vertical black-and-white barcode on the turquoise surface.
description_view_1: This side view reveals part of the 'BAJA BLASTED' label and some starburst graphics beginning to appear.
description_view_2: The front of the can displays the full 'BAJA BLASTED' label in red and green with starburst graphics on the turquoise background.
description_view_3: This view shows the can's side with the edge of the label and a partial view of the barcode.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, stylized 'BAJA BLASTED' logo in red and green with comic-style starburst graphics.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
